name: Email Field Extraction
description: Extract structured fields from email headers
prompt_template:
Extract the following fields from this email:
- sender
- recipient
- subject
- date

Email:
{email_text}

Return as JSON.

input.email_text:
From: john.doe@example.com
To: jane.smith@company.org
Subject: Q4 Report Review
Date: 2025-01-15

Please review the attached Q4 report.

From: support@service.io
To: user@domain.com
Subject: Your ticket #12345 has been resolved
Date: 2025-01-10

Your support ticket has been closed.
